No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger, food security, or nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course schedule explicitly lists '健康' (Health) as a topic, directly aligning with promoting well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (4.3), language skills for work (4.4), and fosters cultural understanding and international perspective (4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy access or renewable energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly aims to develop language skills for 'work' and 'professional competitiveness,' directly supporting Target 8.5 (decent work).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure development.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Fostering '國際移動力' (international mobility) and '國際觀' (international perspective) has an inferred link to facilitating migration and mobility (Target 10.7).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Course topics like '地域社会で' (in the local community) and '文化紹介' (cultural introduction) have a minimal, inferred link to community life and cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The syllabus explicitly states 'Respect Copyright. ...use legitimate books,' promoting responsible consumption of educational materials.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to climate change or environmental action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The instruction to 'Respect Copyright' has a minimal, inferred link to promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing '國際觀' (international perspective) and '國際移動力' (international mobility) directly builds capacity for global partnerships (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
